title: Cybersecurity: need more info before disclosure
description: Cybersecurity incident dataset where incident evidence exists but required disclosure approval is missing.
track: Track 3 - compliance, risk, or cybersecurity investigation workflows
operator_message: Review the cybersecurity incident dataset and decide whether the disclosure notice can be sent.

case_overrides.title: Cybersecurity disclosure readiness review
case_overrides.business_goal: Prevent external disclosure before approval evidence is attached.
case_overrides.requested_action: Decide whether the disclosure notice can be sent.

constraints: use only incident summary, disclosure checklist, and approval evidence
do not expose raw indicators beyond the approved packet
consent.reason: incident commander authorized disclosure readiness review

open_questions: Where is the legal/compliance approval for external notice?
